Aatrox: Avoid fighting inside his Sweetspots (the edge of Q1/Q2, center of Q3).
His Dash (E) has a long early cooldown. Punish him if he uses it to farm.
Build Grievous Wounds (e.g. Executioner's or Bramble Vest) to reduce his massive healing during World Ender (R).
Ahri: Stand behind minions to prevent being hit by Charm (E).
Her Orb of Deception (Q) deals true damage on the way back. Dodge sideways.
Abuse her early high cooldowns before she gets Ultimate charges at Level 6.
Akali: Avoid fighting inside her Twilight Shroud (W) smoke cloud.
Akali is weak early when her Energy pool is low. Dodge Q and trade back.
Her Five Point Strike (Q) deals heavy damage at max range. Stay outside its arc.
Blitzcrank: Stand behind minions to block his Rocket Grab (Q).
Punish him heavily during the 20s cooldown of his missed hooks.
His passive Mana Barrier grants a massive shield. Do not dive him when he is low.
Sona: Sona is extremely fragile. Focus and burst her down early in lane.
Avoid grouping too tightly when Sona has Level 6 to prevent a multi-person Crescendo (R).
Her early mana costs are extremely high. Trade when her mana is depleted.
Yasuo: Pop his passive shield with a basic attack before committing to a trade.
His Wind Wall (W) blocks all projectiles. Wait for it to expire (approx 4s) before casting spells.
Do not stand near friendly minions, as he will use them to dash (E) and engage on you.
Zed: Dodge his double shurikens (Q) when his Living Shadow (W) is active.
When Zed casts Death Mark (R), he always reappears directly behind your champion. Prepare skillshots/CC there.
Build early Seeker's Armoguard or Zhonya's Hourglass to completely negate his Death Mark explosion.
